payload.answer: I’m not confident which “Sam” this note should attach to, so please choose how to proceed.
repair_options: Attach the note to Sam if you mean the existing Sam in memory.
Create or use a separate Sam entry if this refers to a different person.
Keep the note uncommitted for now until you provide more context.
Provide a clarifying detail, such as Sam’s last name, relationship, workplace, or how you know them.
